name: Memory Leak
description: High CPU combined with high memory usage and OOMKilled events strongly indicates a memory leak in the application.
evidence_template: High CPU ({cpu_usage}%), high memory usage, and OOMKilled events detected.

name: Application Startup Failure
description: CrashLoopBackOff combined with readiness probe failures indicates the application is failing to start correctly.
evidence_template: CrashLoopBackOff and readiness probe failures detected — application cannot start successfully.

name: Storage Exhaustion
description: Disk usage above 95% combined with pod restarts indicates storage exhaustion causing the pod to restart.
evidence_template: Disk usage critical (>95%) and pod restart detected — storage exhaustion identified.

name: Network Misconfiguration
description: Network timeouts combined with DNS failures indicate a network misconfiguration or DNS resolution issue.
evidence_template: Network timeouts and DNS failures detected — probable network misconfiguration.

name: Node Resource Pressure
description: Memory pressure on the node combined with pod eviction events indicates the node is under resource pressure.
evidence_template: Memory pressure and pod eviction events detected — node resource pressure confirmed.

name: CPU Throttling
description: Sustained high CPU throttling indicates the pod's CPU limit is too low for its workload.
evidence_template: High CPU usage ({cpu_usage}%) with significant throttling — CPU limit too restrictive.

name: OOM Kill
description: OOMKilled event with high memory usage indicates the container exceeded its memory limit.
evidence_template: OOMKilled event with high memory usage — container exceeded memory limit.
